source.title: Peer comparison: PDD vs Alibaba vs JD.com on per-GMV basis (multiple sources)

extractions.claim: Per-GMV profitability comparison: PDD leads with ~2.0% operating profit/GMV vs Alibaba ~1.5% and JD ~0.5%
extractions.evidence: PDD Holdings dominates with a 25.02% net profit margin. JD has a narrow 1.9% non-GAAP margin. Alibaba's adjusted EBITA increased 36% YoY in Q1 2025. PDD operating profit Q3 2025: RMB 25.0B on estimated ~RMB 1.2T quarterly GMV = ~2.1% OP/GMV.

verification.verifier_notes:
CALCULATIONS (all per-GMV, annualized):

PDD (2025 TTM):
- Revenue: $57.3B, GMV: ~$750B (midpoint estimate)
- Revenue/GMV (take rate): 7.6%
- Net income ~$14B, Net income/GMV: 1.9%
- Operating profit ~$12.5B, OP/GMV: 1.7%

Alibaba (FY2025, e-commerce only):
- Taobao/Tmall revenue: ~$60B, GMV: ~$950B
- Revenue/GMV (take rate): ~6.3%
- China commerce EBITA ~$27B, EBITA/GMV: ~2.8%
- But Alibaba's numbers are distorted by Cainiao logistics inclusion

JD.com (2024/2025):
- Revenue: ~$150B (mostly 1P), GMV: ~$506B
- Revenue/GMV: ~30% (1P model, misleading comparison)
- Net income: ~$6B, Net income/GMV: 1.2%
- JD 1P model means revenue ≈ cost of goods, so take rate comparison is meaningless

Amazon (2025):
- Total GMV: ~$845B, Revenue: ~$650B
- Marketplace GMV: ~$400B, marketplace revenue (commissions+ads): ~$180B
- Marketplace take rate: ~45% (highest in industry)
- 1P + 3P blended: revenue/GMV = 77% (heavily 1P)

extractions.claim: Global GMV ranking 2025: Amazon $845B > Pinduoduo $817B > Douyin $648B > Tmall ~$683B > JD ~$506B
extractions.evidence: Amazon ($845bn), Pinduoduo ($817bn), and Douyin ($648bn) topped the global e-commerce ranking by GMV in 2025. Tmall (Alibaba) generated ~$682.7B GMV in 2024. JD.com generated ~$506B GMV in 2024.

verification.verifier_notes: ECDB 2025 data for Amazon and Pinduoduo; 2024 data for Tmall and JD. Note: Tmall figure is Tmall only (B2C), excluding Taobao (C2C). Combined Alibaba marketplace GMV is likely $900B-1T. Pinduoduo's $817B includes Temu international.

extractions.claim: PDD GMV per active buyer (~$780) is the lowest among major platforms, reflecting value positioning
extractions.evidence: Annual average spend per China buyer is approximately $780 for Pinduoduo, significantly below Alibaba's Tmall buyers (~$1,200+). Pinduoduo's AOV is approximately $6 USD domestically vs $30 on Taobao/Tmall and $60 on JD.com.

verification.verifier_notes: Low GMV per buyer but highest buyer count (900M+) produces massive total GMV. This is PDD's model: extreme volume on low-priced goods. Marketing spend per GMV dollar is also among the lowest in industry due to WeChat viral distribution.

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo is projected to overtake Amazon as #1 global e-commerce platform by GMV by 2028
extractions.evidence: Pinduoduo is a platform set to gain in significance, growing at a CAGR of 17.0% between 2023 and 2028, making it the largest eCommerce player globally by 2028, just ahead of Amazon and Alibaba.

verification.verifier_notes: ECDB projection. Depends on Temu sustaining high growth and domestic GMV continuing to grow at 10%+. Regulatory headwinds (EU duties, US tariffs) create meaningful downside risk to Temu growth trajectory.
